indicators.name: large U-shaped couch
indicators.rationale: The large U-shaped couch takes up a significant portion of the space, leaving little room for a flat work surface or ergonomic seating.

indicators.name: several small tables
indicators.rationale: Small tables are not suitable for placing a laptop or keyboard, making it difficult to set up a workspace.

indicators.name: low lighting
indicators.rationale: The lighting appears to be ambient and not task-specific, which can lead to eye strain and reduced productivity.

indicators.name: open layout
indicators.rationale: The open layout makes it difficult to create a private and focused workspace, as there is no separation from other areas.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The large U-shaped couch and lack of flat work surfaces make it challenging to set up a workspace. Additionally, the low lighting and open layout contribute to a less than ideal environment for focused solo work.
